OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: IP to update the facility account for operating hours
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: PHOCS Update Operating Hours on Facility Account

omniProcessElements.name: Remote
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "UpdateAccountOperatingHours", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { }, "failOnStepError" : false, "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "remoteClass" : "PHOCSFoodPremiseLicenseController", "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "id" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : [ ], "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : [ ], "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "transientValues" : { "activateOrDeactivateConsent" : false } }
